series_metadata.series_description: IOC''s, e-mails, structure type studies, stage 1 review submissions, stage 2 review submissions, stage 3 review submissions, scope of services, Value Engineering Change Proposal(VECP) correspondence, VECP design plans, design calculations, design consultant inquiries, telephone records (if any), minutes of meetings, contractor''s alternative temporary shoring designs and other general project correspondence. Bridge hydraulics project review comments. Project specific Mechanically Stabilized Earth(MSE) shop drawings, project specific MSE wall design calculations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: receipt of official copy of "Termination of Contractor''s Responsibility" letter is received from district or no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: receipt of official copy of "Termination of Contractor''s Responsibility" letter is received from district or no longer of administrative value
